content.text: {"title":"Client lists widgets","slug":"client-lists-widget-records","intent":"An API client needs to browse widget records for display or selection.","story":"The client requests the widgets collection.","expected_behavior":"The API returns available widget records.","boundaries":"This story does not cover creating widgets.","auditable_claims":["The list widgets route is user-facing."],"evidence":{"tests":[],"surface":["route: GET /api/widgets"],"docs":[]}}
